description: WebScraping.AI is a web scraping and extraction service that fetches page HTML or text, supports JavaScript rendering and proxies, and offers AI-powered question answering and field extraction from web pages.
summary: WebScraping.AI exposes a single authenticated REST API at https://api.webscraping.ai with an OpenAPI spec, plus official npm-distributed CLI and stdio MCP server wrappers that both use the same API key.
